no_public_remotes.evidence: git remote -v returned no remotes before private origin setup.

private_origin_configured.evidence: No private remote URL was available in this session, and the available GitHub connector cannot create repositories.

repository_visibility_private.evidence: Remote repository visibility cannot be verified until a private remote URL or repository-management capability is provided.

no_active_public_publishing_targets.evidence: Root package metadata is private and no public publishConfig, .npmrc, container push workflow, or release workflow was found.

no_leaked_secrets.evidence: Credential-pattern search found no active checked-in external secret material in the audited source/config surface.

no_telemetry_leakage.evidence: No external analytics or telemetry endpoint was found; local /metrics remains local runtime observability.

no_inherited_deployment_hooks.evidence: No checked-in deployment hook configuration was found.

no_accidental_artifact_publication.evidence: Artifact generation scripts are local-only; no automatic public upload or release target was found.

integrity_validation_gate.evidence: Fresh npm run proof:full and npm run test:local:concurrency passed. Concurrency observed winner_count 100, loser_count 100, duplicate_allows 0; final_verdict PASS_READY_FOR_PROOF_EXPANSION; drift_mismatch_count 0; replay_mismatch_count 0.

required_before_push: Create or provide a private remote repository URL for AegisOne.
Add only that private URL as origin.
Re-run git remote -v and validation before push.
